name: bench-canvas
description: Read and update BenchAGI command-center canvas tiles, drift-state snapshots, and edge-flow state. Enforces Amendment 10 (truth-sync to canvas). All calls carry the user's Bench UID for scoping.

tools.name: canvas_tile_update
tools.description: Update the text of a canvas tile by node_id. Writes through to the vault via the wiki-mirror pipeline (or direct Firestore fallback). Enforces Amendment 10 truth-sync.

body_schema.new_text: string (full replacement markdown for the tile body)
body_schema.reason: string (optional; short explanation for the audit log)

tools.name: canvas_drift_state
tools.description: Read the latest drift-detector snapshot. Returns status per tracked tile (green/yellow/red) and the most recent failing check. Source: platform/launchReadiness/<date> written by Cycle 5's daily check.

tools.name: canvas_tile_read
tools.description: Read the current text of a canvas tile by node_id. Useful before updating so callers don't overwrite unrelated state.

tools.name: canvas_edge_flow
tools.description: Read the edge-flow state — which tiles currently point to which. Used when a coordinator agent needs to understand what a change cascade would touch.
